To escape this feeling of loneliness, we need time to meet ourselves and travel through our own worlds. And at the end of that journey lies standing on our own feet. Historically, those who succeeded in this act of independence were philosophers. Through their thoughts and lives, we can establish our own philosophy and gain time to contemplate how we should live. And we will be able to break free from loneliness and find our true selves. A wise person examines the will of Heaven instead of distinguishing right from wrong. - Zhuangzi. What do we live for? Why do we study? Why do we work hard? To live more abundantly? To live more happily? One fact is clear: life is limited. Therefore, we must live each day, each month, each year better. Regarding living well, Zhuangzi said that living well in life means playing well before leaving. Here, playing well refers to complete freedom. Being free refers to freedom from various things such as wealth and fame. It means living entirely as oneself without being swayed by the events that happen to me. It also means not being influenced by fixed ideas, ideologies, or thoughts flowing in from the outside. However, obtaining freedom is not easy. This is due to desire and attachment. We are easily swayed by money, fame, recognition, and the evaluations of others. It is called obsession, to the point of losing oneself. Ultimately, standing alone in life means becoming free from such obsession and being able to live life better. Among the desires that ruin life, money is one of the things we oppose. Money makes many things possible in our lives. People gather around the wealthy and bow their heads to them. In modern society, simply becoming rich can make one special. What such a person says becomes a famous quote, and the actions of the wealthy naturally generate conversation. However, Zhuangzi warned against coveting this without wisdom. Some wealthy people tormented their bodies and worked diligently to accumulate vast fortunes, but because they failed to take care of their health, they passed away without ever properly using their wealth. This is a false pleasure for the sake of one's physical body. We often talk about people who, despite becoming rich, feel empty inside and suffer from anxiety. Zhuangzi says that evaluating others and applying standards based on one's own beliefs is not an act of truly pursuing righteousness, but merely an unnatural manifestation distorted by one's own desires and obsessions. However, if you bet jewels or belt ornaments, it becomes difficult to hit the target. If you bet even gold, the arrow flies far away from the target. This is because the mind is swayed by the expensive prize. The essence of the bow lies in accurately aiming and hitting the target. As the era constantly required competent talent, King Zhao of Chu, having heard of Zhuangzi's reputation, invited him to serve as his prime minister. However, it is said that Zhuangzi refused the envoy sent by the King of Chu, who had brought numerous gifts and wealth. Zhuangzi said, "Have you ever seen a cow offered as a sacrifice? I mean that ox, fed delicious fodder for a long time and wrapped in silk. Yet, in the end, it is offered as a sacrifice. What use is it to think of the fields where the ox struggled and frolicked at that moment? Likewise, do not disturb my freedom. Go back immediately and do not disgrace me any further. I will grow if I am treated this way; I wish to play in the filthy gutter, so just leave me alone." Furthermore, Zhuangzi left behind an anecdote regarding usefulness and uselessness, a story that offers valuable lessons to modern people today. A raccoon catcher, due to his talent, ends up living bound and becomes captive to humans when prey runs out. An agile monkey, with its wide range of activity, wanders here and there, and is eventually discovered in the forest and captured by humans. A burrowing den tries to catch chickens or mice... Running around diligently only to get caught in a weir or a net and die— this metaphor, which feels like an old tale, can also be applied to dialogue. Being alone is not just about living in isolation without family or friends around. Nor is it simply about withdrawing from society and living alone in the mountains, cut off from the world. The true meaning of being alone refers to a state where it is okay to be by one's own two feet. This does not mean forcibly cutting off the world to be alone, but rather means being able to willingly accept and live well even if one inevitably and suddenly drifts away from everyone. Sometimes, even when there are many people around, it is necessary to create time alone to focus on oneself and respect oneself. text: . In the past, everything felt new, and simply going out to meet friends brought me joy without a second thought, but now nothing feels special. I feel disheartened at the thought that the rest of my life will likely be a repetition of this boring existence. Born without purpose and driven into choices, there are times when I cannot find my bearings—where on earth did life begin, what am I, and where my existence is headed. The French philosopher Jean-Paul Sartre said that life has no purpose or intention. He said that I was simply born without reason and merely live until I die. What does it mean that the life I am living now has no such intention or purpose? All the objects around me possess a purpose. To make a knife, the craftsman must have the intention of creating a blade capable of cutting objects. A hammer, while originally intended for breaking things or driving in pieces, [is used] to [transmit] a phone call between people far apart... There is a purpose to make things possible, but humans are not born with any intention or purpose. I was not born as an office worker from the start. I didn't even choose to be born. Whether we wanted it or not, humans suddenly came to exist in this world. From my perspective, I suddenly came into existence in this world, and it is merely a matter of me recognizing myself. Some might argue from an evolutionary standpoint that humans are born for species reproduction. In fact, there are disciplines that predict human behavior to some extent based on this. However, there are plenty of people who act in the exact opposite way to claims made from an evolutionary perspective. This is because it is a human characteristic to act differently from one's ideals depending on the environment or situation. Sartre said that nothing is predetermined regarding what humans should do. Here, essence refers to the intention and purpose mentioned earlier, while existence signifies that I exist in the world. Regarding the knife used to cut objects mentioned earlier, a craftsman creates the knife with a clear intention and purpose. In this case, the intention and purpose come first, and existence follows. Conversely, the idea that existence precedes essence means that humans come into existence in this world, and the intention and purpose of my life are created through my life. From the moment I am born, countless... Many choices are presented to us. My life is determined by my choices. Since I am the one making the choices, I am always the subject shaping my life. My life is formed by the accumulation of the results of those choices. I can choose for myself which medical school to apply to. I select the things I wanted to do today after work. I decide when to wake up the next morning. Factors I did not want to consider may be taken into account in these choices. However, in the end, we make countless choices ourselves every day. Compared to the past, the volume of options modern people must consider has increased tens of times. Therefore, we must think deeply, if only to avoid regretting the outcome of our choices. Ultimately, life becomes more tiring, and on the other hand, we may not spare money or time in our efforts to live a simpler life. However, problems in life arise precisely because we can choose. Humans live their lives together with others. Therefore, those choices can have a negative or positive impact on someone.

Therefore, those choices can have a negative or positive impact on someone. We cannot know what results our choices will bring or how they will affect us and the world. This is because choices carry uncertainty. For this reason, uncertainty gives us the emotion of anxiety. The nature of anxiety arises from the past and the future. Negative experiences from the past surface the moment we make a choice in the present, primarily tormenting us. In this way, past experiences Based on this, we begin to worry by imagining negative events that might unfold in the future. Worry follows one after another, and ultimately, the very freedom of choice makes humans anxious. However, we cannot live without choices, for even not choosing is a valid option. The choice referred to here does not simply mean the act of selecting. Humans can assign meaning to everything when situations or phenomena occur in the world. In doing so, they can even choose invisible emotions or feelings. A diamond was not merely a sparkling stone until humans assigned it the meaning of beauty. However, the moment humans choose to assign value and price to it, the meaning of a gem is imbued. The same applies to the lives given to us. Depending on how I interpret the current situation, what is happening to me can become hell or a turning point in life. I can choose far more things than I realize; it simply depends on whether I feel or notice them, and whether I can view them from a broader perspective. Perhaps I am missing out on good opportunities right in front of me because I am trapped by my current anxiety. The freedom of choice implies that we are beings capable of creating many things. This is because it gives room for interpretation that humans are beings who create their own intentions and purposes. My current self is the result of the choices I have made from the past until now. I bear the responsibility myself. Perhaps someone else might feel a sense of injustice regarding this responsibility. I was not born into this world by choice, nor was the environment I faced as a child my own choice.
